From the retrieved document:

```xml
Code to take first true occurrence value:
<xsl:variable name="VAR_FCR_NUMBER">
<xsl:for-each select="/ns0:Message-DISNEY_POINV/ns0:Record-HLDTL">
<xsl:if test="normalize-space (ns0:Field-FCR_NUMBER ) != ''">
<xsl:value-of select='concat(normalize-space (ns0:Field-FCR_NUMBER),"//")'/>
</xsl:if>
</xsl:for-each>
</xsl:variable>

output field/element mapping: <xsl:value-of select='substring-before($VAR_FCR_NUMBER,"//")'/>
```
